steps.title: Find the pronoun target
steps.content: The astronomers attributed the star's wobble to the gravitational influence of the exoplanet. The blank must refer back to "the wobble," which is singular.

steps.title: Use a singular object pronoun
steps.content: A does not fit because there is no set of individual items, while B and D are plural and do not agree with "the wobble." The sentence needs a singular object pronoun after "attributed." The answer is C.
